mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.workflow_id, s.stat_date, s.total_runs, s.success_count, s.failed_count, s.running_count, s.avg_duration_ms, s.max_duration_ms, s.min_duration_ms, s.total_tokens, s.human_tasks_count, s.human_tasks_avg_minutes, d.name AS workflow_name FROM workflow_stats s LEFT JOIN workflow_definition d ON s.workflow_id = d.id WHERE 1 = 1 AND s.stat_date >= #{startDate} AND s.stat_date <= #{endDate} ORDER BY s.stat_date DESC

SELECT s.workflow_id AS workflowId, d.name AS workflowName, SUM(s.total_runs) AS totalRuns, SUM(s.success_count) AS successCount FROM workflow_stats s LEFT JOIN workflow_definition d ON s.workflow_id = d.id GROUP BY s.workflow_id, d.name ORDER BY totalRuns DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_stats (workflow_id, stat_date, total_runs, success_count, failed_count, running_count, avg_duration_ms, max_duration_ms, min_duration_ms, total_tokens, human_tasks_count, human_tasks_avg_minutes) VALUES (#{workflowId}, #{statDate}, #{totalRuns}, #{successCount}, #{failedCount}, #{runningCount}, #{avgDurationMs}, #{maxDurationMs}, #{minDurationMs}, #{totalTokens}, #{humanTasksCount}, #{humanTasksAvgMinutes}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_runs = #{totalRuns}, success_count = #{successCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, running_count = #{runningCount}, avg_duration_ms = #{avgDurationMs}, max_duration_ms = #{maxDurationMs}, min_duration_ms = #{minDurationMs}, total_tokens = #{totalTokens}, human_tasks_count = #{humanTasksCount}, human_tasks_avg_minutes = #{humanTasksAvgMinutes}
